title: What Sales Actually Is
shortSummary: Sales is problem-solving, not persuasion. Learn what sales really means, how it creates value, and develop the mindset that separates good reps from great ones.
whyItMatters: Every successful sales career starts with understanding what sales truly is. Most people think sales is about convincing someone to buy something they don't need. In reality, sales is the art of identifying problems and connecting people with solutions. When you internalise this, you stop feeling like you're 'selling' and start feeling like you're helping — and buyers can feel the difference.
coreConcepts: The value exchange: both sides should win
How major sales methodologies shape rep behavior
The sales mindset: curiosity, resilience, and empathy
How revenue drives every business function
The difference between features and outcomes
